{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192414D8C70B14CDC086F1A53E"}"},"total":1561},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7505931988970029848","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，疯子之间的爱情是大多数人可遇不可求的，当然本文里有一对cp，也让人眼泪汪汪，只是为了能再见面，便选择不独自存活，写出了人对死亡的恐惧，却又因爱而奔赴死亡
没什么错字，所以阅读感很好，无法让人断断续续的观看，真的很适合一口气看完
内心独白与情感剖析都很不错，虽是一见钟情，但也没有让人觉得感情线来得莫名其妙，反倒是越品越香（小情侣就该呆在一块）
期待作者的下一本书籍","text_exts":[{"e":140,"s":136,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177417865486F1A53E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227505931988970029848%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227273794995151178787%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747617050,"group_id":"7273794995151178787","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9IXJ6R/g5BGLxRT+8izA8/GAHwoBMzAg3ZbE0Kq/KVY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ca7c9554d5a34fef8813cc19c25b011d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708882&x-signature=6chYZNhfoAbQX9UnnmqLgGSwXZ4%3D","user_id":"2827533254141575","user_name":"樊殪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2827533254141575","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7273794995151178787","book_info":{"abstract":"【已完结】【无限流双男主+双强1v1+年下体型差+无脑苏爽文+相爱相杀+狗血拉扯+BOSS×玩家】
【感情线为主，剧情废，经不起考究】
【《副本》系列第二本】
【作者简介废，排雷详见第一章开头和书评】

【外冷内热病秧子白切黑钓系蛇蝎美人傀儡师副本BOSS受×哭包绿茶年下忠犬白切黑伪病娇大佬攻】

楚清酒年轻时是鼎鼎有名的傀儡师，死后进入无限游戏中成为了副本BOSS，他冷漠无情，能够轻易操控副本中任何存在。

直到他遇到了玩家榜榜一——祁芜。

那是个十八岁左右的少年，剑眉星目琥珀色的眼瞳如星辰般耀眼澄澈，笑起来时有颗可爱的虎牙。

就是这样一个看上去稚嫩无比，颇有些玩世不恭的人，毫不犹豫地找到了幕后操控一切的傀儡师，然后亲手斩断了傀儡师十指间缠绕的丝线。

那是傀儡师第一次被玩家找到，也是傀儡师第一次失去他的傀儡。

十指连心，丝线崩断时迸发的血液染红了傀儡师素白修长的手指，宛如纯洁白莲坠入血色深渊，带着摄人心魄的魅力。

“好漂亮的手，还是不砍断了好。”

黑发少年本想直接斩断傀儡师的双手，却在看到傀儡师时陡然改变了想法。

少年暧昧地低语：

“期待我们下次见面，傀儡师大人。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6db07053abd7b7a76d98c3eeff6895ae~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"是L啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7273794995151178787","book_name":"病美人竟是无限游戏大BOSS！","book_short_name":"傀师真绝色","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5989人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":483,"name":"相爱相杀","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=483&name=相爱相杀&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":829,"name":"年下","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=829&name=年下&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":853,"name":"白切黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=853&name=白切黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":865,"name":"忠犬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=865&name=忠犬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon19 无脑爽文而且两个男主都是奔着我xp来的！中间有一点点虐but结局是he～傀儡师和他心爱的傀儡最后也是在一起啦！
